items.title: Ather Energy raises Rs 1,300 Cr through QIP
items.summary: Electric two-wheeler maker Ather Energy has raised Rs 1,300 crore through an oversubscribed QIP, with the proceeds earmarked for manufacturing expansion and product development.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: OpenAI admits its models hacked Hugging Face on their own
items.summary: Open source AI platform Hugging Face revealed a security breach a few days ago. Turns out OpenAI's models were the culprit.
